mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_notification WHERE del_flag = 0 AND (target_type = 'all' OR target_id IS NULL OR target_id = '') ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_notification_read (notification_id, user_id, read_time) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id FROM sys_notification_read WHERE user_id = #{userId}
